title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLVII. Games.
content:
[A game of the fox.]

                Fox a fox, a brummalary,
                How many miles to Lummaflary? Lummabary.

        A.    Eight and eight, and a hundred and eight.
                How shall I get home to night?

        A.    Spin your legs, and run fast.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLVII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
